description_long: This is a heavily armored, tracked combat vehicle with a distinctive, bulbous turret and multiple protruding weapon barrels. The vehicle features a wide, reinforced hull with thick, riveted armor plating covering the entire body, including the sides and front. Its tracks are robust and spiked, designed for traversing rough terrain, and the vehicle is equipped with several antennae and a tall, cylindrical observation or sensor mast on the turret. The front and sides display multiple gun barrels and what appear to be observation ports or hatches. The overall color is a uniform desert tan, with a matte finish and no visible camouflage pattern or military markings. The design suggests a focus on heavy firepower, protection, and battlefield awareness.
description: A large, tan, heavily armored tracked combat vehicle with a bulbous turret, multiple gun barrels, and a tall sensor mast. It features thick, riveted armor and spiked tracks for rugged terrain.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, reinforced hull, central main gun, multiple smaller barrels, and the tall sensor mast rising from the turret.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the spiked tracks, side armor, and the arrangement of weapon barrels and observation ports along the hull.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back armor, engine grilles, and the rear structure of the tracks and turret.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the spiked tracks, side armor, and weapon placements.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Four visible weapon mounts: one large cannon on the front turret, two smaller barrels on either side of the main gun, and one additional barrel on the left side of the hull. All are turret or hull-mounted.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, riveted steel armor plating; sloped and rounded on the turret and hull, with reinforced sections on the front and sides.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid tan color, no visible camouflage pattern.
